arguments.summary: Read app/models.py (11 lines) — Post model with id/title/content/created_at. Read app/routes.py (17 lines) — Flask Blueprint with list_posts and get_post endpoints. Need to add: Tag model, post_tags association table, relationship on Post, and tag filter endpoint.
next_steps: Add Tag model and association table

arguments.content:
from sqlalchemy import Column, Integer, String, Text, DateTime, Table, ForeignKey
from sqlalchemy.orm import relationship
from sqlalchemy.sql import func
from app.database import Base

post_tags = Table(
    'post_tags', Base.metadata,
    Column('post_id', Integer, ForeignKey('posts.id'), primary_key=True),
    Column('tag_id', Integer, ForeignKey('tags.id'), primary_key=True)
)

class Tag(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'tags'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(50), nullable=False, unique=True)

    def __repr__(self):
        return f'<Tag {self.name}>'

class Post(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'posts'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    title = Column(String(200), nullable=False)
    content = Column(Text, nullable=False)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, server_default=func.now())
    tags = relationship('Tag', secondary=post_tags, backref='posts')

arguments.content:
def test_add_tag_to_post(db_session):
    tag = Tag(name='python')
    post = Post(title='Learn Python', content='Tutorial')
    post.tags.append(tag)
    db_session.add(post)
    db_session.commit()
    assert len(post.tags) == 1
    assert post.tags[0].name == 'python'

def test_tag_has_posts(db_session):
    tag = Tag(name='flask')
    p1 = Post(title='Flask 101', content='Basics')
    p2 = Post(title='Flask Advanced', content='Advanced')
    p1.tags.append(tag)
    p2.tags.append(tag)
    db_session.add_all([p1, p2])
    db_session.commit()
    assert len(tag.posts) == 2

arguments.final_answer:
Added tagging support to blog engine:
1. app/models.py — new Tag model (id, name unique), post_tags association table (many-to-many), relationship on Post with backref='posts' on Tag.
2. app/routes.py — new GET /api/posts/by-tag/<tag_name> endpoint. Looks up tag, returns its posts with tag names included. Returns 404 for unknown tags.
3. tests/test_models.py — added Tag import, test_add_tag_to_post and test_tag_has_posts verifying both directions of the many-to-many relationship.
All 4 tests pass.
